features: Eliminates Odours & Deodorises – Targets and neutralises lingering smells from pets, cooking, smoke, and everyday use, leaving your home smelling clean and fresh.
Freshens Carpets & Rugs – Revives tired carpets and rugs with long-lasting fragrance, creating a more inviting and pleasant living space.
Easy to Use – Just Sprinkle & Vacuum – No mess, no hassle—simply shake evenly over your carpet, let sit, and vacuum away for instant freshness.
3 Refreshing Scents – Includes 1 x Fresh Linen, 1 x Lily Blossom, and 1 x Floral Garden for variety throughout your home.
Great Value 3-Pack (3 x 500g) – Ample supply for regular use across multiple rooms—ideal for households with pets, kids, or high foot traffic.
description: Product description Breathe new life into your carpets with Shake & Fresh Carpet Odour Neutraliser – the quick and easy way to eliminate odours and refresh your home. This powerful formula doesn’t just mask bad smells – it neutralises and deodorises them at the source, leaving your carpets and rugs beautifully scented. Each 500g bottle is packed with freshness and comes in three delightful fragrances: Fresh Linen, offering a crisp and clean scent like freshly washed sheets; Lily Blossom, bringing a soft, floral touch perfect for a calming vibe; and Floral Garden, delivering a blooming bouquet to liven up your living space. Perfect for homes with pets, children, or high traffic, this carpet freshener is incredibly simple to use: just sprinkle evenly, leave it to work for a few minutes, then vacuum away. It’s designed to eliminate odours and deodorise carpets and rugs, leaving them smelling clean and feeling fresh. Whether it’s pet smells, food odours, or general mustiness, this formula gets to work fast and effectively. With three refreshing scents included in this value bundle, you can rotate fragrances throughout your home or pick the perfect scent for each room. And with 3 x 500g bottles, you’ll have plenty to keep your spaces fresh and inviting for weeks to come. Ingredients parfum, limonene, linalool Directions Sprinkle evenly over the carpet, let sit for a few minutes, then vacuum away. See more
